meaning: 骞夸笢(浣嶄簬涓浗鍗楅儴)
examples: Guangdong is one of the provinces in China.
Guiyu in Guangdong Province is one of them.
I went to Guangdong and visited my auntie's family.
The latest investors are Sukida Motorcycles of Guangdong province and Chu Zhan Stone Corp of Shanghai.
Authorities in Puning, a county in southern Guangdong province, detained 1, 377 people this month.
